final:
module flash_memory_cell (
    input wire D,
    input wire WE,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (WE) begin
            Q = D; // Write operation
        end
        // If WE is low, keep the previous value of Q
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (!WE) begin
        Q <= ~Q;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
